Records.description: Two-loop vacuum diagram (triangle graph, no external legs) with three propagators carrying independent masses. Generating functions for top and sub-top sectors derived.

Two-loop vacuum tadpole I_3^{a,b,c} with three internal lines of distinct masses E1, E2, E3 and arbitrary integer powers a, b, c. Section 2.1 derives explicit LTD residue formulas (Eqs. 2.9-2.11 / 2.12-2.14) covering the three surviving cuts and validates them against MATAD on the tensor cases I_222, I_232, I_332 (table after Eq. 2.14). Numerator structures include (l1.l2), (l1.l1)(p.l1)(p.l2). Topology: two vertices joined by three parallel propagators (sunrise / banana skeleton, no external momenta).
Records.familyName: Two-loop vacuum tadpole with raised propagator powers (unequal masses)

Names: Two-loop vacuum tadpole with raised propagator powers (unequal masses)
